title: helianthus besseyi
intro: Helianthus besseyi, also known as Maximillian's sunflower or Bessey's sunflower, is a perennial plant species native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the digestive system and act as a natural anti-inflammatory agent. Helianthus besseyi has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can also be used in herbal remedies.
